creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
The new version of mail/dkim-milter 2.6.0 has been released.
	Release notes: https://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=606077

Fix: UPGRADING note:
  AFFECTS: users of mail/dkim-milter
  AUTHOR: umq@ueo.co.jp

  Most of the command line options are now can be set in configure
  files. So the default values (such as milterdkim_socket) are changed
  to blank.
  Upgrading users should check the values both in rc.conf and
  dkim-filter.conf.

 

	The patch follows:

cvs server: Diffing .
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
